description: BCC backlinks ledger. Manually maintained. Add new entries as Daniel discovers them (via Ahrefs free, Google search 'link:bariatriccounselingcenter.com', or referral mentions). Sources transcribed from 2026-05-13 Todd meeting + ongoing discovery.

backlinks.notes: 5 different student-resources pages link to BCC. Strong .edu signal -- exactly the kind of authority backlink that moves rankings.
5 inbound links from this bariatric surgery practice. They also rank for the same SA queries -- collaboration vs competition?
Cites BCC by name as a source: 'information compiled by the Bariatric Counseling Center'. Topic-relevant, high-quality citation. Likely came from Sara Hamilton's GLP-1 article being shared.

wish_list.rationale: Medical school in SA -- has bariatric/nutrition program. Pitch as guest expert or resource page.
Other Texas universities with health programs.
Express-News health column, San Antonio Magazine wellness section -- pitch a guest piece on emotional-eating science.
